data.title: Genesco Q4 Earnings Report: What Investors Need to Know
data.description: Genesco (NYSE: GCO) released its Q4 earnings report on March 6, 2026 at 06:50 AM. The latest announcement revealed that Genesco surpassed estimated earnings by 0.27%, reaching an EPS of $3.74 compared to the estimated $3.73. The revenue also saw a notable increase of $53.99 million compared to the previous year. However, it is important to note that in the previous quarter, the company fell short on EPS by $0.07, leading to a 6.77% decrease. For a detailed analysis, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bullish releases February 2026 monthly metrics
data.description: A leading global digital asset platform, Bullish (NYSE: BLSH), revealed its February 2026 statistics on March 6, 2026. The data covers important parameters such as trading volume, average trading spread, and volatility indicators for Bitcoin and Ethereum. For detailed explanations and further insights into these metrics, access the monthly metrics packages on investors.b.

data.title: Roche's Obesity Drug Shows Promise But Trails GLP-1 Giants Novo Nordisk, Eli Lilly
data.description: Roche Group AG's efforts to promote its obesity drug are facing tough competition following Genentech's Phase 2 findings, indicating weight loss of up to 10.7% — falling short of expectations compared to top treatments from Novo Nordisk A/S and Eli Lilly and Co. Genentech recently disclosed initial results from the ZUPREME-1 trial, where 493 obese individuals participated, with an average BMI of 37 kg/m². In 2025, Genentech and Roche partnered with Zealand Pharma to jointly develop and market petrelintide for obesity, with Zealand Pharma securing a $1.65 billion upfront payment, plus potential development milestones of $1.2 billion and sales-based milestones of $2.4 billion. The study successfully achieved its main objective, demonstrating that once-weekly subcutaneous injections of petrelintide (escalated every fourth week) offered both statistically significant and clinically significant outcomes. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: FuelCell Energy Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: On March 9, FuelCell Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: FCEL) will report its first-quarter earnings before the market opens. Analysts predict the Connecticut-based company will post a loss of 68 cents per share, an improvement from the $1.44 loss per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be $42.21 million, up from $19 million a year earlier. FuelCell Energy recently announced a partnership with Sustainable Development Capital to meet the growing power needs of data centers globally. The company's stock closed at $8.08 on Thursday, dropping by 5.7%. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Skimmer and Heritage Pool Supply Announce Strategic Partnership to Modernize Pool Industry Operations
data.description: In Austin, Texas, the initial phase of the Skimmer-Heritage merger allows Skimmer users to seamlessly incorporate Heritage product data into their accounts. This connection ensures that product details are current and precise, empowering pool professionals to handle products, expenses, and pricing more effectively. This integration allows Skimmer clients to synchronize Heritage items into their accounts, providing real-time updates and access to comprehensive product descriptions. This enhancement enables users to maintain accurate records and make informed decisions confidently.

data.title: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. Declares First Quarter 2026 Common Share Dividend of U.S.$0.0650 (C$0.0888), and Declares First Quarter 2026 Preferred Share Dividends
data.description: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. ("AQN") based in Oakville, Ontario, has declared dividends for its common and preferred shares. The approved dividend for common shares is US$0.0650 per share, payable on April 15, 2026, to shareholders of record on March 31, 2026. This dividend covers the period from January 1, 2026, to March 31, 2026. Registered shareholders have the option to receive the dividend in Canadian dollars. AQN's board of directors sanctioned this decision. The company's common shares trade on the TSX under the symbols AQN, AQN.PR.A, AQN.PR.D, and on the NYSE as AQN.

data.title: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (AQN) based in Oakville, Ontario, announced their financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The net earnings for the quarter amounted to $29.4 million, equal to $0.04 per common share. Adjusted net earnings for the same period were reported at $47.2 million, translating to $0.06 per common share. For the full year ending on December 31, 2025, the net earnings totaled $208.0 million, or $0.27 per common share. Adjusted net earnings for the same period were disclosed as $258.8 million, or $0.34 per common share. These figures show a significant increase in earnings compared to the previous period.
